title: CGELBank core category/function codebook
summary: Reviewed micro-package for CGELBank's core English syntax representation: node categories, incoming-edge functions, and projection-spine conventions, with validation summarized from the published 50-sentence interannotator study.

supported_inferences: Consistent trained-human CGELBank-style category/function annotation for English syntax trees under the documented formalism.
Treebank/parser conformance checks against the declared CGELBank core representation.
unsupported_inferences: Complete encoding of all CGELBank construction policies.
Claims that CGELBank exhausts English syntax.
LLM annotation reliability without separate instrument validation.
Lossless UD/PTB-to-CGELBank conversion from this package alone.
scope_conditions: Annotators use the CGELBank manual or equivalent policy source.
The comparison metric is declared: flex, strict, gap, full-tree, or another specified score.
Validator warnings are reviewed rather than treated as automatic adjudication.
failure_zones: Documented CGELBank divergences from CGEL print representations.

title: Toy English intensifier codebook
summary: Toy codebook-as-program package for testing the lingputation registry infrastructure. It is not empirically validated.

supported_inferences: After validation, within-register frequency comparison of degree-intensifier candidates under a fixed extraction procedure.
unsupported_inferences: Diachronic trends without a separate measurement-drift check.
